description: Full-factorial DOE matrix: every combination of the listed factor levels, returned in real units with a randomized run order.
rules: read-only — reads a JSON spec, writes a CSV; mutates no live service
seeded — the run order is reproducible from SPEC_JSON.seed
factor values are explicit level lists (e.g. [20,40,60] or ["A","B"])
usage: Set SPEC_JSON to a JSON file with keys: factors (required dict {name:[level,...]}), randomize (bool, default true), seed (int). Output: experimental_runs.csv under record_store.
limitation: Run count is the product of level counts, so it explodes quickly with many factors — use fractional-factorial or plackett-burman to screen. When pyDOE3 is absent the porter writes an empty {} artifact.
